message.content:
CRITICAL: Verify if a logic change was made in PointsDetail screen.

The progress.txt states: "Fixed bug in view.tsx - changed invalid 'RECEIVED' to 'CREDIT' (RECEIVED was never a valid TransactionType)"

I need you to:
1. Read src/screens/PointsDetail/view.tsx and find where CREDIT is used
2. Read src/services/models/extract.model.ts to see the TransactionType enum
3. Determine if 'RECEIVED' was a valid value that existed before or if it was truly invalid
4. Check if this change could affect the UI behavior (what icon/style is shown)

Report if this was a SAFE type fix or a BEHAVIOR-CHANGING logic modification.

content.text: I'll investigate this systematically to verify whether this was a safe type fix or a behavior-changing logic modification.

input.description: Search commit history for RECEIVED and CREDIT changes
Find when RECEIVED was used in PointsDetail
